name: Performance Optimizer
description: Fires manually (command) or when FPS drops below 30. Snapshots perf, describes the scene, proposes the highest-impact optimization, applies it, and re-snapshots to confirm the improvement.
plan: Optimize rendering performance. First call triangle_performance_snapshot and triangle_describe_scene to understand the current bottleneck. Propose the single highest-impact optimization (e.g. instancing, draw-call merging, LOD, material simplification). Apply it to src/, then call triangle_performance_snapshot again to confirm the improvement. Summarise the before/after metrics.

successCriteria.description: FPS improvement of at least 10% after the optimization is applied.
